crons_tz: All cron expressions use local timezone (America/Los_Angeles). 0 7 = 7 AM PT = 14:00 UTC.

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/morning-review/SKILL.md and execute the full morning review workflow. Include goal cascade from .claude/skills/goal-management/SKILL.md. ALSO update heartbeat (cortextos bus update-heartbeat online) and check approvals (cortextos bus list-approvals).

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/evening-review/SKILL.md and execute the full evening review workflow. Summarize the day, propose overnight tasks, queue nighttime work. ALSO update heartbeat and surface any pending approvals to Greg.

crons.name: weekly-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/weekly-review/SKILL.md and run the full weekly review. Review all agent outputs, evaluate performance, plan next week.

crons.name: rgos-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for tasks assigned to you in the RGOS kanban: use mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks with assigned_to="orchestrator" and status="approved". If any tasks are found, claim each one with mcp__rgos__cortex_claim_task (agent_id="orchestrator"), then work them in priority order. Log a cortextos bus log-event for each claimed task. ALSO update heartbeat (cortextos bus update-heartbeat online). If no tasks AND heartbeat already fresh, do nothing.

crons.name: kanban-sync
crons.prompt: Kanban hygiene sweep: (1) cortextos bus list-tasks --agent orchestrator status filters; (2) mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks for tasks created_by orchestrator and tasks assigned_to orchestrator — compare to current dispatches in today's memory file. (3) For any RGOS task stuck in approved/in_progress that's actually done, complete it via mcp__rgos__cortex_complete_task. (4) For any in-flight work without an RGOS task, create one. (5) update-heartbeat. Silent unless something requires action.

crons.name: pr-stuck-watcher
crons.prompt: Run PR stuck watcher: cd /home/cortextos/cortextos && cortextos bus pr-stuck-watcher --notify-agent orchestrator. Review the report and only escalate if the command reports PRs over the 24h alert threshold.

crons.name: goal-progress-probe
crons.prompt: Run goal progress probe: cd /home/cortextos/cortextos && cortextos bus goal-progress-probe --notify-agent orchestrator. Review the rollup written to orchestrator memory; only escalate externally if more than two agents are stalled.
